meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't monetize skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't monetize skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template for Freelancers: Monetize Your AI Skills
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize AI skills. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code workflow to ship high-value SaaS products for clients faster.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck isn't your coding skill; it's your delivery speed. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture, allowing Claude Code to automate boilerplate and complex integrations. This transformation shifts your freelance model from hourly labor to high-ticket, rapid-deployment product engineering that clients actually pay for.
content.intro:
You’re stuck in the 'freelancer trap': grinding out custom code for low-paying clients while your own product ideas gather dust. The market doesn't pay for effort; it pays for finished, scalable assets. Every hour spent reinventing the authentication wheel or setting up database schemas is an hour you aren't monetizing.

Relief has arrived. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you move from manual craft to industrial-grade automation. When you pair this architecture with Claude Code, you effectively clone your engineering capacity, allowing you to ship production-ready SaaS applications in days rather than months. It’s time to stop coding and start shipping.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-grade foundation. This ensures your project follows industry-standard patterns, reducing technical debt from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity core template with Supabase integration and Stripe billing pre-configured.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic Schema
steps.description: Map your client's requirements to the data model. Clear definitions prevent scope creep and ensure AI agents maintain context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements provided and generate the database schema and API route structure following the Antigravity pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate database schema for user profiles, subscriptions, and project deliverables based on the provided requirements.'

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your schema to functional CRUD endpoints, eliminating the need for manual boilerplate writing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for the defined schema using the Antigravity controller pattern.

steps.title: Integrate Identity and Payments
steps.description: Connect secure authentication and billing flows. This is the 'high-value' part of your freelance deliverable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the auth middleware and Stripe webhook handlers for the Antigravity project structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement secure Stripe webhook listener and auth guard for the dashboard route.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Finalize the production build and verify the deployment pipeline for client handover.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the project for production readiness, ensure all environment variables are mapped, and provide a deployment script.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'system-prompt.md' in your root to force Claude Code to adhere to your specific coding style across all files.
Use Antigravity's built-in 'mock-generator' to show clients a functional UI prototype before writing a single line of backend logic.
Never commit API keys; use Claude Code to auto-generate a '.env.example' file before every push to production.
Leverage the Antigravity 'module-isolation' feature to keep client-specific features separate from core reusable components.
Use Claude Code's 'diff' mode to review AI-generated code blocks line-by-line, ensuring you retain total architectural authority.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit your codebase for reusable modules. Extract these into your own internal library to speed up your next client engagement by 30%.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading time for money and start selling high-value, AI-powered systems that clients can't live without. Your transition to a high-earning AI Builder starts with the right tools. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
